title: Create a monitor and see it in the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a logged-in user can create a monitor and immediately see it reflected in their monitor list and dashboard stats.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the monitor creation screen
Fill in the monitor name field with a unique monitor name
Fill in the website URL field with a valid URL
Select a valid check interval
Fill in a valid threshold value
Save the monitor
Verify the new monitor appears in the user's monitor list
Verify dashboard stats are displayed

title: Register a new account and open the authenticated session
description: This test verifies that a visitor can register a new account and reach the authenticated state with a usable session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Open the registration form
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the name field with a display name
Submit the registration form
Verify the authenticated user profile is displayed
Verify session-specific account information is displayed

title: Log in and log out of an existing account
description: This test verifies that a registered user can sign in successfully and then end the session by logging out.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the account menu
Log out of the account
Verify the user is returned to an unauthenticated state
Verify protected account content is no longer displayed

title: Prevent editing a monitor you do not own
description: This verifies that a signed-in user cannot access or modify another user's monitor and sees an ownership error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a monitor that belongs to another account
Verify an ownership error is displayed
Verify the monitor details are not shown

title: Manual check increases monthly quota for a Pro monitor
description: A Pro user can run a manual check on an existing monitor and see their current month quota usage increase afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing Pro monitor
Trigger a manual check for the monitor
Verify the monitor check completes successfully
Verify the current month quota usage has increased

title: Trigger a manual check and review the new diff
description: This test verifies that a Pro user can trigger a manual check on an existing monitor and then open the resulting diff history and diff detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an existing monitor's details page
Trigger a manual check for the monitor
Open the monitor's diff history
Open the most recent diff detail
Verify a new diff entry is displayed
Verify diff details and monitor metadata are displayed

title: Monitor creation is blocked when projected quota would be exceeded
description: A user cannot create a new monitor when the projected checks would exceed their plan quota, and the monitor is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new monitor with a valid target URL
Set the interval and threshold for the monitor
Save the monitor
Verify a quota limit error is visible
Verify the monitor was not created

title: See monitor status reflected on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can create a monitor and then see it reflected in the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Create a new monitor for a valid page URL
Wait for the monitor to be processed
Navigate to the dashboard
Verify dashboard stats are displayed
Verify the new monitor appears in the monitor summary

title: Manual check is blocked when monthly quota is exhausted
description: A user with no remaining monthly checks cannot trigger a manual check, and the monitor stays unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing monitor with no remaining quota
Trigger a manual check for the monitor
Verify a quota limit error is visible
Verify no new check result is created

title: Delete a monitor and remove its related history
description: This test verifies that deleting an owned monitor removes it from the UI and no longer shows its related history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an existing monitor's details page
Delete the monitor
Confirm the deletion action
Verify the monitor is removed from the user interface
Verify related monitor history is no longer displayed

title: Trigger a manual check for a Pro monitor
description: This verifies that a Pro user can manually check an existing monitor and see the monitor status update afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing Pro monitor
Trigger a manual check for the monitor
Wait for the check to complete
Verify the monitor shows a recent check result
Verify the monitor's last checked time is updated

title: Preview a selector before saving a Pro monitor
description: This test verifies that a Pro user can preview a CSS selector in the DOM picker and then save a monitor using that selector.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the monitor creation screen
Fill in the monitor name field with a unique Pro monitor name
Fill in the website URL field with a valid URL
Select a valid check interval
Open the selector picker preview
Choose a CSS selector to preview
Save the monitor
Verify the selector preview is displayed
Verify the monitor is created successfully

title: Use DOM Picker to find content before saving a Pro monitor
description: This verifies that a Pro user can preview a selector, save a Pro monitor with selector-based extraction, and see it reflected in the monitor list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the DOM picker preview page
Fill in a valid page URL in the URL field
Fill in a valid CSS selector in the selector field
Submit the preview request
Save the preview as a new Pro monitor with selector-based extraction
Verify the Pro monitor is displayed
Verify dashboard stats include the new monitor

title: Review the latest diff for a monitor
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open a monitor's diff history and inspect the most recent change detail.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a monitor that has a recorded change
Open the diff history for the monitor
Open the most recent diff detail
Verify diff history entries are displayed
Verify diff detail content is displayed

title: View monitor diffs and a diff detail page
description: This test verifies that a user can open a monitor's diff history and inspect the full detail for a specific diff.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an existing monitor's diffs page
Open a specific diff entry
Verify diff history is displayed
Verify full diff details are displayed

title: Preview a selector on a page
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can preview how a CSS selector resolves on a target page and see extracted content returned.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the DOM picker preview page
Fill in a valid page URL in the URL field
Fill in a valid CSS selector in the selector field
Submit the preview request
Verify extracted content is displayed
Verify the response includes the page status

title: Update monitor settings and keep ownership enforced
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can update an owned monitor and that the updated settings are reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an existing monitor's details page
Open the edit monitor form
Change the monitor name
Change the monitor interval
Change the active state
Save the monitor changes
Verify the updated monitor settings are displayed

title: Create a monitor from a selector preview
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can preview content and then save a monitor based on the same target page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the DOM picker preview page
Fill in a valid page URL in the URL field
Fill in a valid CSS selector in the selector field
Submit the preview request
Save the preview as a new monitor
Verify the new monitor is displayed
Verify dashboard stats include the new monitor

title: View the current account profile and preferences
description: This test verifies that a logged-in user can open their account profile and see current user information and preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the account profile page
Verify the current user profile is displayed
Verify account preferences are displayed

title: Delete a monitor and remove it from the account
description: This verifies that an account owner can delete a monitor and no longer see it in their monitor list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open one of the user's monitors
Delete the monitor
Confirm the deletion
Verify the monitor is removed from the list
Verify an empty or reduced monitor list is displayed

title: Update a monitor's settings
description: This verifies that an account owner can edit a monitor's threshold, interval, or active state and see the updated settings saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open one of the user's monitors
Open the monitor settings
Change the monitor threshold, interval, or active state
Save the monitor changes
Verify the updated monitor settings are displayed
Verify the monitor remains in the user's monitor list

title: Update the account profile successfully
description: This test verifies that a logged-in user can change profile details and see the updated account information afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile settings page
Change the display name
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: Block sign in with invalid credentials
description: This test verifies that entering incorrect login credentials keeps the visitor signed out and shows an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials message is displayed
Verify the user remains signed out

title: Generate a new API token
description: This test verifies that a logged-in user can generate an API token and see it displayed in their account settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the API token settings page
Generate a new API token
Verify a new API token is displayed
Verify the token can be viewed in account settings

title: Monthly quota bucket refreshes for active users
description: An active user can continue checking monitors after the monthly quota bucket rolls over, and the new month usage is applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the quota or usage view
Wait for the next month usage bucket to be shown
Verify a current month quota bucket is displayed
Verify checks can be used from the refreshed bucket

title: Show validation on duplicate registration email
description: This test verifies that attempting to register with an email already in use shows a duplicate-account validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Open the registration form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the name field with a display name
Submit the registration form
Verify a duplicate email validation message is displayed
Verify the registration is not completed

title: Show validation when creating a monitor with a bad threshold
description: This verifies that a signed-in user sees validation feedback when monitor threshold input is outside the allowed range.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new monitor
Fill in a valid page URL in the URL field
Fill in an out-of-range threshold value
Save the monitor
Verify a threshold validation error is displayed

title: Create a monitor with invalid input
description: This test verifies that invalid monitor data is rejected and validation feedback is shown without creating a monitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the monitor creation screen
Fill in the monitor name field with a unique monitor name
Fill in the website URL field with an invalid URL
Fill in an out-of-range threshold value
Save the monitor
Verify validation errors are displayed
Verify the monitor is not created

title: Block monitor creation without a valid URL
description: This verifies that a signed-in user cannot create a monitor until a valid target URL is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new monitor
Leave the URL field empty
Save the monitor
Verify a URL validation error is displayed

title: Reject an invalid preview URL
description: This verifies that a signed-in user sees a validation error when the DOM picker is used with a malformed URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the DOM picker preview page
Fill in a malformed URL in the URL field
Fill in a valid CSS selector in the selector field
Submit the preview request
Verify a validation error is displayed

title: Reject Pro-only monitor settings on a Free account
description: This test verifies that a Free user cannot save Pro-only selector or exclusion settings when creating a monitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the monitor creation screen
Fill in the monitor name field with a unique monitor name
Fill in the website URL field with a valid URL
Select a valid check interval
Add a CSS selector rule
Add an exclusion rule
Save the monitor
Verify a plan restriction message is displayed
Verify the monitor is not created

title: Handle an empty selector result
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can preview a valid page with a selector that matches nothing and see an empty result state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the DOM picker preview page
Fill in a valid page URL in the URL field
Fill in a selector that does not match content in the selector field
Submit the preview request
Verify the preview returns empty or partial extracted content

title: Handle a non-existent diff record gracefully
description: This verifies that a signed-in user sees a not-found style state when opening a diff detail that is unavailable in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the diff history for a monitor
Open a diff that is no longer available in the UI
Verify a not-found state is displayed
